artworks.title: The Loom of Morning
artworks.blurb: Warm ochre threads cross a pale field, catching the first light. The weaver's rhythm is steady, almost breathing — a study of patience made visible.

artworks.title: Low Tide, Grey Harbour
artworks.blurb: Boats lean on the mud, waiting for the water to return. Muted greens and slate blues hold the quiet hour between ebb and flood.

artworks.title: Ember Study No. 3
artworks.blurb: Small sparks scatter against near-black. Read close, the darkness is not empty — it is full of heat about to become light.
